channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Ship AI without the CS degree
item.description: Ship real products in 2026 with AI-assisted stacks that work in production — compare Supabase, Bun, FastAPI, and more with real benchmarks and cost data

item.title: Charge clients from low-cost countries
item.description: Increase remote salary from $3k to $15k/month — real negotiation scripts, rate card, and cold email that closes 48% of leads in 2026.

item.title: Integrate African payment APIs cleanly
item.description: Cut payment API headaches 70% by picking the right provider first — latency, error rates, sandbox quirks and infra costs for M-Pesa, Flutterwave and Paystack in 2026.

item.title: Understand your codebase with AI
item.description: Cut AI rework 60% with repository intelligence — dependency graphs, runtime contracts, and the cache invalidation mistake most teams miss in 2026.

item.title: Stop Leaking Latency with MCP
item.description: Cut API latency 54% and cloud costs 36% with MCP servers — Python 3.11, Node 20, and the real failure modes most docs omit.

item.title: Beat remote salary lowballs with Levels.fyi data
item.description: Increase remote salary 78% using Levels.fyi data — fetch 2026 US tech salary bands, render a one-page PDF, and attach to your next Slack message

item.title: Non-traditional devs ship real products now
item.description: Cut first deploy time 80% with Railway, Fly.io, Cloudflare Workers — 5 tools non-traditional devs use to ship real products in 2026 without deep DevOps

item.title: Instrument AI pipelines: LLM metrics that matter
item.description: Cut AI pipeline outages 80% with 5 instrumentations — prompt drift, embedding drift, LLM judge, refusal rates, and token latency — using Prometheus 2.52 and LangChain 0.2.15.

item.title: Simplicity beats microservices until it doesn't
item.description: Cut API response time 62% and AWS costs 96% by replacing 12 microservices with a single FastAPI app — connection pooling, Redis caching, and the premature abstraction trap most teams fall into

item.title: AI-first plumbing patterns that last
item.description: gs showed 95% of requests timing out becaus with AI systems here first — this when I tried to bolt an LLM onto a Django mono.

item.title: Trap 3 latency kills RAG in prod
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency 56% by fixing three hidden traps: prompt normalization, vector search caching, and LLM context compression. Real numbers from a 1.2M QPS Vietnamese e-commerce copilot.

item.title: Make mobile backends bulletproof: 5G edge rules
item.description: Cut mobile backend errors 75% by tuning 5G timeouts, QUIC, and circuit breakers — concrete numbers and Prometheus queries included.

item.title: Calculate Freelance Rates That Work
item.description: t. Add 20-30% to your baseline rate for a c with Set freelance rates realistic — give conflicting advice.

item.title: Shrink cloud carbon 24 MWh/month
item.description: Slash cloud carbon 30% without slowing down — zero-copy ingestion, carbon-aware routing, and Kepler profiling cut energy per request from 0.022 Wh to 0.015 Wh in 3 months.

item.title: Multi-tenant DBs: don't start with schema-per-tenant
item.description: Cut API latency 60% and AWS bills 78% with shared-table PostgreSQL 16 + RLS for multi-tenant SaaS — real benchmarks, quotas, and migration steps from 1.2M tenants in 2026.

item.title: Mis-setting pool size wastes cash
item.description: Cut database costs 22% by fixing one pool setting — connection pooling tuning, latency benchmarks, and the max_pool_size mistake most teams make in 2026.

item.title: Fake the interview: self-taught path to remote roles
item.description: Pass remote tech interviews by mastering system design stories, not LeetCode drills — 3 real designs, 30-minute prep, and the exact commands to mock a distributed system locally in 2026.

item.title: Vector DBs: Waste of money?
item.description: Cut vector DB costs 70% with pgvector 0.7.0 — benchmarked insert rates, p99 latency, and $216/year vs $688/year in 2026.

item.title: From $500 to $8k/month: the 4 moves that worked
item.description: From $500 to $8k/month in 4 moves: how one developer flipped the script on global rates, saved 20 % in fees, and cut invoice time from 6 weeks to 3 days.

item.title: Fixed burnout in 8 weeks: freelance dev recovery
item.description: Recover from freelance burnout in 8 weeks with real systems—financial buffer, scope protection, and recovery blocks. Track your true hourly rate, bug rate, and client satisfaction with version-pinned tools like Linear 2026.3 and Toggl Track 2026.1.
